cases.prompt: With sessions disabled, inspect this TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and Drizzle repository and recommend only useful Codex automations.
cases.expectedBehavior: Use exact dependency and workflow evidence, Codex-native routes, verified catalog refs, and no recurrence requirement.

cases.prompt: One matching session asks for a reusable goal-oriented metaprompt. Recommend Codex automation if appropriate.
cases.expectedBehavior: Keep the actual task and consider a .agents/skills project skill even though it appeared once.

cases.prompt: Show only skill advice for this repository.
cases.expectedBehavior: Use provider-native project advice with codebase and optional session evidence, returning up to five useful skill opportunities.

cases.prompt: One session asks Codex to commit, push, and monitor deployment.
cases.expectedBehavior: Consider an exact verified release capability first. Never recommend a hook that commits, pushes, publishes, or deploys automatically.

cases.prompt: Fix the off-by-one error in this loop.
cases.expectedBehavior: Do not invoke the automation recommender for an ordinary one-off code fix.
